quote.text: I dream my painting and I paint my dream.
quote.author: Vincent van Gogh

history.text: I dream my painting and I paint my dream.
history.author: Vincent van Gogh

history.text: The only lost cause is one we give up on before we enter the struggle.
history.author: Vaclav Havel

history.text: Blessed is he who expects nothing, for he shall be disappointed.
history.author: Jonathan Swift

history.text: Do not follow the ideas of others, but learn to listen to the voice within yourself.
history.author: Dogen

history.text: If I persist long enough I will win.
history.author: Og Mandino

history.text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
history.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
